name: Avino Silver & Gold Mines Ltd.
description: Avino Silver & Gold Mines Ltd. is a Canadian-based resource company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and advancement of mineral properties. The company's primary focus is on silver, gold, and copper production and exploration at its wholly-owned Avino Property near Durango, Mexico. Established in 1968, Avino has a long history of production and is committed to building shareholder value through sustainable organic growth and profitable mining operations.
